login.title: Sign in to your account to start chatting with AI
login.terms: By clicking "Sign in with Yandex", you agree to the terms of use

callback.title: Authorization
callback.errorDescription: An error occurred while authorizing through Yandex ID
callback.successDescription: You have successfully authorized through Yandex ID

chat.deleteDescription: This action cannot be undone. All messages in this chat will be deleted.
chat.title: Chat

welcome.title: Hello!
welcome.description: Start a conversation by sending a message below

slide1.title: Welcome to Skye!
slide1.description: Skye is a modern open-source AI chat client. We're creating a tool that respects your privacy and gives you full control over your data.

slide2.title: Organize your chats
slide2.description: Create unlimited chats, rename them and organize by topic. All your conversations are always at hand in the sidebar.

slide3.title: Responsive design
slide3.description: Use Skye on any device. The interface automatically adapts to your screen size - whether it's a smartphone, tablet or desktop.

slide4.title: Light and dark theme
slide4.description: Switch between light and dark themes in settings. Choose the mode that's comfortable for your eyes. The theme automatically adapts to your device.

slide5.title: Privacy and security
slide5.description: We don't use tracking and don't collect your data. All data is stored locally in your browser. Full control over your information.

slide6.title: Open source
slide6.description: Skye is an open source project. We do everything openly and transparently. Found a bug or have an idea? Create an issue on GitHub, and we will definitely consider it!

error.tryAgain: Try to authorize again or contact support
